title: Skopeo copy does not allow to pull the destination images afterwards
body:
I'm using skopeo to copy images between 2 private registries (great tool!!!).
Unfortunately, after performing the copy, I cannot pull the image from the destination - seems not tags are created.

curl -ks https://docker-registry.service.strato:1818/v2/inspector/tags/list
{"errors":[{"code":"NAME_UNKNOWN","message":"repository name not known to registry","detail":{"name":"inspector"}}]}

But I when listing the repos it's there:
curl -ks https://docker-registry.service.strato:1818/v2/_catalog
{"repositories":["abacus","bash","dbs-manager","*inspector*","quotas-manager"]}

The way I make the copy is:

docker run --rm --net=host luebken/skopeo skopeo --debug copy docker://rackattack-nas.dc1:5000/inspector:56504bada00c8a2ffd916fb256216e160c7adfd5 docker://docker-registry.service.strato:1818/inspector:56504bada00c8a2ffd916fb256216e160c7adfd5

version:
docker run --rm --net=host luebken/skopeo skopeo --version
skopeo version 0.1.14-dev commit: 2b8fe09de2173e71f8ea5061912a63d429cfbb87

docker registry is registry:2

What am I missing?

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

Does
```sh
skopeo inspect --debug docker://docker-registry.service.strato:1818/inspector:56504bada00c8a2ffd916fb256216e160c7adfd5
```
work, and if not, how does it fail?

Also the `--debug` output of the `skopeo copy` command might be useful.

> ```sh
> skopeo inspect --debug docker://docker-registry.service.strato:1818/inspector:56504bada00c8a2ffd916fb256216e160c7adfd5
> ```

I’m sorry, this should have been
```sh
skopeo --debug inspect docker://docker-registry.service.strato:1818/inspector:56504bada00c8a2ffd916fb256216e160c7adfd5
```

@mtrmac
